title: Telegram Frontend Message Handling
entry_points: handle_msg(update, ctx)  — triggered by MessageHandler for TEXT & ~COMMAND
activity_flow_handle_msg: DECISION: ALLOWED set non-empty AND uid not in ALLOWED?
ACTION: build prompt string with [FILE:filepath] instruction prepended
ACTION: dq = agent.put_task(prompt, source='telegram')  [returns a queue]
END: handler returns (stream runs independently as async task)
activity_flow_stream: ACTION: drain queue dq → get latest item (dq.get_nowait() loop)
ACTION: raw = item['done'] if done else item['next']
→ YES: msg = await msg.reply_text('(continued...)'); reset last_text; show = show[-3900:]
ACTION: display = show + ' ⏳' if not done else show
→ YES: await msg.edit_text(_to_html(display), parse_mode='HTML')  [fallback: plain text]
DECISION: path is absolute? → resolve relative to _TEMP_DIR
activity_flow_cmd_abort: ACTION: agent.abort()  [signals agent to stop current task]
DECISION: task exists AND not task.done()?
activity_flow_cmd_llm: ACTION: lines = agent.list_llms()  [list of (index, name, is_current)]
ACTION: reply_text formatted LLM list with '→' marker on current
startup_flow: Acquire single-instance socket lock on 127.0.0.1:19527 (exit if already bound)
Check ALLOWED non-empty (exit if empty — security guard)
threading.Thread(target=agent.run, daemon=True).start()  [agent runs in background thread]
On exception: sleep(10), new event loop, retry

key_helpers._clean(t): Strip <thinking>, <summary>, <tool_use>, <file_content> tags via regex; collapse 3+ newlines to 2; return '...' if empty
key_helpers._to_html(t): Convert markdown to Telegram HTML: escape HTML, wrap fenced code blocks in <pre><code>, convert **bold** → <b>, *italic* → <i>, `code` → <code>

key_relationships: handle_msg depends_on agent.put_task → returns queue dq
cmd_abort calls agent.abort() AND cancels stored stream_task
_stream reads from dq (queue produced by agent), calls _clean, _to_html, msg.edit_text, msg.reply_photo/reply_document
agent (GeneraticAgent) runs in daemon thread, communicates via queue
important_notes: Message overflow threshold: 4000 chars → spawn new reply message, keep last 3900 chars
File attachments encoded as [FILE:path] in agent output, parsed at stream done
Relative file paths resolved against _TEMP_DIR (project root /temp/)
Auth: ALLOWED set from mykeys['tg_allowed_users']; empty ALLOWED blocks startup entirely
parse_mode='HTML' with fallback to plain text on edit failure
Telegram bot token from mykeys['tg_bot_token']; proxy from mykeys['proxy'] (default: http://127.0.0.1:2082)
